title: Register a new vendor successfully and land on dashboard
description: Verifies a vendor can register with valid email/password, shop name, unique slug, and valid international WhatsApp number and is redirected to the dashboard.

steps.description: Type "Atlas Boutique" into the shop name field
Type "+212612345678" into the WhatsApp number field

title: WhatsApp number invalid format blocks registration
description: Verifies invalid WhatsApp number format shows a validation error and does not redirect to the dashboard.

steps.description: Type "Marrakech Finds" into the shop name field
Type "0612345678" into the WhatsApp number field

title: Required fields validation when submitting empty form
description: Verifies the registration form enforces required fields and does not proceed when submitted empty.

title: Invalid email format blocks registration
description: Verifies an invalid email address format triggers validation and prevents redirect to dashboard.

steps.description: Type "Rabat Picks" into the shop name field
Type "+212622222222" into the WhatsApp number field

title: Weak password blocks registration
description: Verifies a too-short or weak password triggers an error and does not redirect to dashboard.

steps.description: Type "Fez Crafts" into the shop name field
Type "+212633333333" into the WhatsApp number field

title: Slug format validation prevents invalid characters
description: Verifies the slug field rejects invalid characters and prevents successful registration.

steps.description: Type "Tangier Trends" into the shop name field
Type "Tangier Trends!!!" into the slug field
Type "+212644444444" into the WhatsApp number field

title: Successful registration shows confirmation messaging (if present)
description: Verifies that after successful registration, the UI shows a visible success confirmation before or during redirect to dashboard.

steps.description: Type "Sahara Styles" into the shop name field
Type "+212655555555" into the WhatsApp number field

title: Create a new visible product with multiple image URLs (up to 5)
description: Verifies a vendor can add a product with multiple image URLs, enable visibility, save, and see it appear in the product list.

steps.description: Type "Argan Oil - 100ml" into the product name field
Type "https://example.com/img1.jpg" into the first image URL field
Type "https://example.com/img2.jpg" into the second image URL field
Type "https://example.com/img3.jpg" into the third image URL field
Type "https://example.com/img4.jpg" into the fourth image URL field
Type "https://example.com/img5.jpg" into the fifth image URL field
Click the visibility toggle to set the product to visible

title: Create a product with only one image URL
description: Verifies a vendor can create a product using just one image URL and it appears in the product list.

steps.description: Type "Saffron Threads" into the product name field
Type "https://example.com/saffron.jpg" into the first image URL field

title: Validation: cannot save product when Name is blank
description: Verifies the product form shows a required-name validation error and does not create the product when name is missing.

steps.description: Type "" into the product name field
Type "https://example.com/blank-name.jpg" into the first image URL field
Verify text "Name is required" is visible

title: Validation: prevent adding more than 5 image URLs
description: Verifies the UI prevents a vendor from adding a 6th image URL (or shows an error) when the maximum of 5 images is reached.

steps.description: Type "Test Image Limit" into the product name field
Type "https://example.com/1.jpg" into the first image URL field
Type "https://example.com/2.jpg" into the second image URL field
Type "https://example.com/3.jpg" into the third image URL field
Type "https://example.com/4.jpg" into the fourth image URL field
Type "https://example.com/5.jpg" into the fifth image URL field

title: Vendor can switch between Dashboard tabs: Home → Produits → Commandes
description: Verifies the bottom tab bar is visible on the vendor dashboard and tab taps navigate to Products and Orders pages.
category: Vendor Dashboard Navigation (Home, Products, Orders, Settings)

title: Vendor can navigate from Products tab to Orders tab
description: Verifies that tapping the Commandes tab from within Products takes the vendor to the Orders page.
category: Vendor Dashboard Navigation (Home, Products, Orders, Settings)

title: Vendor can navigate to Settings tab (Paramètres) from Orders
description: Verifies that tapping the Paramètres tab navigates to the Settings page from another dashboard section.
category: Vendor Dashboard Navigation (Home, Products, Orders, Settings)

title: Vendor can return to Home tab from another section
description: Verifies that the Home tab returns the user to the dashboard home page after navigating elsewhere.
category: Vendor Dashboard Navigation (Home, Products, Orders, Settings)

title: Bottom tab bar is visible on Dashboard Home
description: Verifies the vendor dashboard home shows the fixed bottom navigation with all expected tabs.
category: Vendor Dashboard Navigation (Home, Products, Orders, Settings)

title: Bottom tab bar is visible on Products page
description: Verifies the vendor products page still shows the fixed bottom navigation for quick switching.
category: Vendor Dashboard Navigation (Home, Products, Orders, Settings)

title: Bottom tab bar is visible on Orders page
description: Verifies the vendor orders page still shows the fixed bottom navigation for quick switching.
category: Vendor Dashboard Navigation (Home, Products, Orders, Settings)

title: Bottom tab bar is visible on Settings page
description: Verifies the vendor settings page still shows the fixed bottom navigation for quick switching.
category: Vendor Dashboard Navigation (Home, Products, Orders, Settings)

title: Vendor can view the orders list in Order Management
description: Verifies that an authenticated vendor can reach the Orders page and see an orders list UI.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the dashboard navigation

title: Vendor can open an order and view key order details
description: Verifies that selecting an order shows the detail view including customer and product information.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first order in the orders list

title: Order detail view displays customer name
description: Verifies the order details screen contains a visible customer name value.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first order in the orders list

title: Order detail view displays customer phone
description: Verifies the order details screen contains a visible customer phone field/value label.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first order in the orders list

title: Order detail view displays customer city
description: Verifies the order details screen contains a visible city field/value label.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first order in the orders list

title: Order detail view displays ordered product information
description: Verifies the order details screen contains visible product information for the order.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first order in the orders list

title: Vendor confirms an order and sees status updated to CONFIRMED
description: Verifies that confirming an order updates the visible status to CONFIRMED.

steps.description: Click on "Orders" in the dashboard navigation
Click on the first order in the orders list

title: Admin can view the platform admin vendor list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access the /admin page and see the vendor list and moderation controls.

title: Admin can open the Create User page from the Admin list
description: Verifies the Create action from the admin list navigates to the user creation form.

title: Admin creates a new Vendor user from /admin/create
description: Verifies an admin can submit the creation form for a Vendor user and return to the vendor list.

steps.description: Select "Vendor" from the user type dropdown

title: Admin creates a new Admin user (is_admin enabled) from /admin/create
description: Verifies an admin can create an admin-level user by selecting Admin and enabling is_admin before submitting.

steps.description: Select "Admin" from the user type dropdown

title: Validation: Create user form blocks submission when required fields are empty
description: Verifies the creation form shows visible validation feedback when attempting to create a user without required inputs.

title: Non-admin user is denied access to /admin
description: Verifies an authenticated but non-admin user cannot access the admin page and is redirected or shown an access denied message.

title: Admin list page shows moderation controls on vendor rows
description: Verifies the admin vendor list includes visible moderation controls that an admin can interact with (without requiring data changes).

title: Update WhatsApp number successfully and see confirmation
description: Verifies a vendor can update their WhatsApp number in international format and sees a visible success confirmation with the updated value reflected.

steps.description: Fill "+212600000000" into the WhatsApp number field

title: Slug conflict shows validation error and does not apply change
description: Verifies that attempting to save an already-used slug displays a visible validation error and the change is not applied.

steps.description: Verify text "slug already in use" is visible

title: Settings page loads profile form fields for vendor
description: Verifies the Settings page loads and shows the vendor profile form elements needed to edit profile details.

title: WhatsApp number rejects invalid format and shows validation error
description: Verifies the Settings form blocks saving an invalid WhatsApp number and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Fill "0600000000" into the WhatsApp number field

title: Slug field rejects empty value and shows required validation
description: Verifies the vendor cannot save settings with an empty slug and sees a visible required/invalid message.

title: Cancel/discard changes keeps saved profile values unchanged (if available)
description: Verifies that using a visible cancel/discard action (if present) does not apply edits to the profile form values.

steps.description: Fill "+212611111111" into the WhatsApp number field
